field.name: contract_json
field.eval: {"view_orchestration": {"views": {"form": {"fields": [{"name": "state", "sequence": 10, "readonly": True}, {"name": "project_id", "label": "项目", "sequence": 20, "required": True}, {"name": "date_diary", "label": "日志日期", "sequence": 30, "required": True}, {"name": "diary_type", "label": "日志类型", "sequence": 40, "required": True}, {"name": "title", "label": "日志标题", "sequence": 50}, {"name": "weather", "label": "天气", "sequence": 60}, {"name": "construction_unit", "label": "施工单位", "sequence": 70}, {"name": "project_manager", "label": "项目经理", "sequence": 80}, {"name": "manpower_count", "label": "现场人数", "sequence": 90}, {"name": "attendance_equipment", "label": "出勤机械", "sequence": 100}, {"name": "description", "label": "今日施工内容", "sequence": 110}, {"name": "material_inspection_note", "label": "材料进场/送检", "sequence": 120}, {"name": "hidden_acceptance_note", "label": "隐蔽工程验收", "sequence": 130}, {"name": "next_plan", "label": "下步计划", "sequence": 140}, {"name": "quality_name", "label": "质量事项", "sequence": 150}, {"name": "safety_note", "label": "安全情况", "sequence": 160}, {"name": "test_block_note", "label": "试块制作", "sequence": 170}, {"name": "design_change_note", "label": "设计变更/技术核定", "sequence": 180}, {"name": "handler_name", "label": "经办人", "sequence": 190}, {"name": "note", "label": "备注", "sequence": 200}]}}}}

field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { "view_orchestration": { "views": { "form": { "fields": [ {"name": "contract_name", "label": "合同名称", "sequence": 10, "required": True}, {"name": "contract_no", "label": "合同编号", "sequence": 20, "readonly": True}, {"name": "contract_type", "label": "合同类型", "sequence": 30}, {"name": "contract_direction", "label": "合同方向", "sequence": 40}, {"name": "project_id", "label": "关联项目", "sequence": 50}, {"name": "partner_id", "label": "往来单位", "sequence": 60}, {"name": "partner_name_text", "label": "合同方", "sequence": 70}, {"name": "credit_code", "label": "统一信用代码", "sequence": 80}, {"name": "contact_name", "label": "联系人", "sequence": 90}, {"name": "contact_phone", "label": "联系电话", "sequence": 100}, {"name": "engineering_address", "label": "工程地址", "sequence": 110}, {"name": "bank_name", "label": "开户行", "sequence": 120}, {"name": "bank_account", "label": "银行账号", "sequence": 130}, {"name": "amount_total", "label": "合同金额", "sequence": 140, "required": True}, {"name": "tax_id", "label": "税率", "sequence": 150}, {"name": "amount_untaxed", "label": "不含税金额", "sequence": 160}, {"name": "currency_id", "label": "币种", "sequence": 170}, {"name": "payment_terms", "label": "付款条件", "sequence": 180}, {"name": "special_condition", "label": "特殊条款", "sequence": 190}, {"name": "contract_date", "label": "合同日期", "sequence": 200}, {"name": "expected_sign_date", "label": "预计签订日期", "sequence": 210}, {"name": "completion_date", "label": "计划交货或完工日期", "sequence": 220}, {"name": "signing_place", "label": "签订地点", "sequence": 230}, {"name": "pricing_mode", "label": "计价模式", "sequence": 240}, {"name": "union_mode", "label": "联合体模式", "sequence": 250}, {"name": "subcontract_mode", "label": "分包类型", "sequence": 260}, {"name": "applicant_name", "label": "申请人", "sequence": 270}, {"name": "applicant_department", "label": "申请部门", "sequence": 280}, {"name": "handler_id", "label": "经办人", "sequence": 290}, {"name": "purchase_engineer", "label": "采购工程师", "sequence": 300}, {"name": "note", "label": "备注", "sequence": 310}, {"name": "name", "visible": False}, {"name": "state", "visible": False}, {"name": "can_review", "visible": False}, {"name": "validation_status", "visible": False}, {"name": "document_no", "visible": False}, {"name": "submitted_time", "visible": False}, {"name": "sign_status", "visible": False}, {"name": "contract_attribute", "visible": False}, {"name": "template_name", "visible": False}, {"name": "is_supplement_contract", "visible": False}, {"name": "related_contract_no", "visible": False}, {"name": "entry_user_id", "visible": False}, {"name": "entry_data", "visible": False}, {"name": "company_id", "visible": False}, {"name": "operation_strategy", "visible": False}, {"name": "source_origin", "visible": False}, {"name": "reject_reason", "visible": False}, {"name": "active", "visible": False}, {"name": "archived", "visible": False}, {"name": "tax_rate", "visible": False}, {"name": "attachment_ids", "visible": False}, {"name": "settlement_amount", "visible": False}, {"name": "invoice_amount", "visible": False}, {"name": "uninvoiced_amount", "visible": False}, {"name": "received_amount", "visible": False}, {"name": "unreceived_amount", "visible": False}, {"name": "paid_amount", "visible": False}, {"name": "unpaid_amount", "visible": False}, {"name": "prepayment_amount", "visible": False}, {"name": "install_commissioning_payment", "visible": False}, {"name": "warranty_deposit", "visible": False}, {"name": "change_amount_total", "visible": False}, {"name": "change_rate", "visible": False} ] } } } }
